zh.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比
zh.Barnoldswick, Lancashire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴諾爾斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Lister於1345年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比時，他的父親Sir John Lister II55歲，母親Lady Isabella de Bolton80歲。他於1370年與Katherine Riley在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1403年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Lister于1345年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比时，他的父亲Sir John Lister II55岁，母亲Lady Isabella de Bolton80岁。他于1370年与Katherine Riley在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1403年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Lister was born in 1345, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Lister II, was 55 and his mother, Lady Isabella de Bolton, was 80. He married Katherine Riley in 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1403, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Lister est né en 1345, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Lister II, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella de Bolton, avait 80 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Riley en 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1403, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Lister 1345 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Lister II 55 und seine Mutter Lady Isabella de Bolton 80. Er hat 1370 in England Katherine Riley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1403 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Lister è nato il nel 1345 nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Lister II, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella de Bolton, aveva 80 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Riley nel 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1403, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Listerが1345年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Sir John Lister IIは55歳，母Lady Isabella de Boltonは80歳であった。1370年にイギリスでKatherine Rileyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1403年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Lister(이)가 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Lister II(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella de Bolton(은)는 80세였다. 그는 1370년 영국에서 Katherine Riley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1403년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Lister nasceu em 1345, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Lister II, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella de Bolton, tinha 80 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Riley em 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1403, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Lister родился в 1345 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Lister II было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella de Bolton, 80. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Riley в 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1403 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Lister nació en 1345, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Lister II, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Lady Isabella de Bolton, tenía 80 años. Se casó con Katherine Riley en 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1403, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
